description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Create Release that triggers on push events, excluding tags starting with 't'. The workflow runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up .NET 7.x.x, restores dependencies, downloads Dalamud, builds the project, updates version information in JSON files, archives the build, uploads it as an artifact, creates a new release, uploads the archive to the release, and updates a repository JSON file and commits it back to the repository.
